response.justification: Bogdan presents a strong profile with significant experience in geospatial data platforms and systems engineering, directly aligning with the core industry and responsibilities. His background includes C++ development, distributed systems architecture, performance optimization, and a clear focus on quality assurance. While explicit 'routing algorithm' experience isn't detailed, his extensive work with GIS data processing and map data collection provides a solid foundation for the 'routing tiling' aspect of the role.
strengths: Extensive experience with geospatial data platforms and processing (GISCollective, Green Map).
Strong background in C++ development and building distributed, low-latency systems.
Proven track record in quality assurance, TDD, and CI/CD practices.
concerns: Lack of explicit experience with routing algorithms or navigation guidance solutions.
No mention of Rust, and 'modern C++' experience isn't fully detailed.
Limited direct experience with integrating real-time traffic signals.
